{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Calder's ship
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder]] has a ship in the water off the edge of the [[island]] used for firing cannons.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
